observed: A tall vertically oriented shaded rectangular solid part preview, matching the orthographic top/side view of a long cylindrical shaft, with dark green part shading on the default SolidWorks gradient viewport background, and an origin marker at the bottom edge of the part.
evidence: The displayed elongated rectangular shaded preview matches the expected orthographic appearance of a long cylindrical shaft viewed perpendicular to its central axis, consistent with a SolidWorks part preview.
